It has taken me 8 years of failing, learning and winning to create this indicator. I have been testing this for over a year and it has a solid 85% win rate. This can easily be bumped up to 90% if one exercises a higher margin of safety. 

Mine is 20%. 12 to 15% for safer plays.

No repainting.

I don't want to have to open my camera to websites, just to proove I am an adult.
